name: Magnetic-Stripe Purgatory
description: Insert three badge-matched cards and calibrate each temperamental reader through physical, reader-specific timed swipes.
natural_language: Insert each card into the reader with the matching badge. Then swipe from the illuminated arrow end to the other end in one straight, monotonic motion. Each reader wants a different hidden speed; use TOO FAST, TOO SLOW, and BAD READ feedback until all three lock, then run the audit.

metadata.notes: The independent replay binds card pickup/drop geometry and every timed stripe sample. Client feedback labels are ignored; direction, coverage, backtrack, straightness, interference, and hidden reader windows are recomputed server-side.
